title: Daily Training
tickModelDone: Today's training has already run. Changes to focus or intensity now take effect at the next training (tomorrow). Form and fatigue update only at the daily training, not continuously.
disabledNote: Daily training starts at the relaunch. Training programs can be set up now.
recoveryNoteTitle: Do riders get energy back every day?
recoveryNote: Yes. Every night around midnight each rider recovers some fatigue, so it never gets stuck at 100. Rest and easy days recover the most; normal training settles at a sustainable level; hard training still builds fatigue up over the day. A high Recovery rating speeds it up.
focusGuideIntro: Each focus develops these abilities faster. Your other abilities keep improving a little more slowly, so riders develop across the board, just fastest in the chosen direction.
focusGuideIntensity: Intensity sets the pace: Easy is safe, Normal is the balanced default (small setback risk), Hard is fastest (clear risk of a setback or injury when fatigue is high).
focusGuideGating: Every rider has a type and a hidden potential per ability. A focus only develops abilities that suit the rider's type: abilities the type is naturally weak in will barely move (or not at all), no matter the intensity. Check the type badge before picking a focus.
trainabilityChipLimitedTitle: This rider's type has little natural aptitude for this focus. Rider type and hidden potential set a ceiling per ability, so growth here will be slow.
trainabilityChipBlockedTitle: This rider's type can't develop these abilities through training. Rider type and hidden potential set a ceiling per ability, and for an opposite-type focus that ceiling is the current level.
trainabilityChipLimited: Limited upside for this rider type
trainabilityChipBlocked: This rider type won't develop these abilities
noRiders: No riders on your squad yet.
bulkPartial: Updated {applied} of {total}. {failed} could not be saved. Try again in a moment.
bulkSmartSkippedHasPlan: {n, plural, one {Skipped # rider with an existing plan.} other {Skipped # riders with an existing plan.}}
historySubtitle: Your last 30 days of daily training
historyEmpty: No training runs yet. Once daily training is live, each day's run will be logged here.
riderHistorySubtitle: This rider's daily training over the last 30 days
riderHistoryEmpty: No training history for this rider yet.
weekRhythmIntro: Set your team's target intensity for each day of the week. Each rider still trains their own focus; the rhythm only steers how hard the day is. "Train today" still needs your click for the consistency bonus.
weekRhythmReset: Weekly rhythm removed: riders are back to their season intensity every day.
weekRhythmSaveFailed: Could not save. Try again in a moment.
weekRhythmBonusNote: The rhythm sets intensity only, never focus, and the manager consistency bonus (+25%) still only applies when you click "Train today" yourself.
individualWeekPlanIntro: Set {name}'s own target intensity for each day of the week. This overrides the team's weekly rhythm for this rider only; focus is never touched here.
individualWeekPlanRemoved: Individual weekly plan removed: rider follows the team rhythm again.
individualWeekPlanBadgeTitle: This rider has their own individual weekly plan, which overrides the team's weekly rhythm.
